title: Modern Combat Elite
description: A tactical gun modpack made to look like the popular game Rainbow Six Siege or R6, also can be used for COD or other FPS
body:
![Title Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6293f95ce6a5d592824036073cc468eb1dbd0985.png)

Modern Combat Elite is a gun modpack that is supposed to replicate games like Call of Duty, Rainbow Six Seige and other FPS. It features:

- **Timeless and Classics Zero**
- **TZCZ: Plus**
- **TACtical Movement**
- **Custom 3D Armor**

  And other game enhancment mods!

I've also added the mod Essential so you can play with your friends!
